metadata.name: Install Red Hat Enterprise Linux Interactively
metadata.description: Manually install Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 using the graphical installer
objectives: Manually install Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10

tasks.name: Verify student user exists
tasks.description: The student user should exist on the newly installed system
tasks.failure_message: Student user does not exist on serverc
hints: During installation, create the student user in User Creation
Ensure the user was created before clicking Begin Installation

tasks.name: Verify student has administrative privileges
tasks.description: The student user should be in the wheel group for sudo access
tasks.success_message: Student user has administrative privileges (wheel group)
tasks.failure_message: Student user is not in the wheel group
hints: During installation, check 'Add administrative privileges' for the student user
Verify with: id student

tasks.name: Verify root account is enabled
tasks.description: The root account should be enabled (not locked)
tasks.failure_message: Root account is locked or disabled
hints: During installation, enable the root account in Root Account settings
Set a root password (redhat) during installation

tasks.name: Verify hostname is serverc.lab.example.com
tasks.description: The system hostname should be set to serverc.lab.example.com
tasks.success_message: Hostname is correctly set to serverc.lab.example.com
hints: Configure hostname in Network & Host Name during installation
Check with: hostname

tasks.name: Verify static IP address 172.25.250.12
tasks.description: The network interface should have static IP 172.25.250.12
hints: Configure static IP in Network & Host Name during installation
Set Method to Manual and add the IP address 172.25.250.12

tasks.name: Verify DNS server configuration
tasks.description: DNS should be configured to use 172.25.250.220
tasks.failure_message: DNS server is not configured correctly
hints: Configure DNS in Network & Host Name > Configure > IPv4 Settings
Set DNS servers to 172.25.250.220

tasks.name: Verify default gateway configuration
tasks.failure_message: Default gateway is not configured correctly
hints: Configure gateway in Network & Host Name > Configure > IPv4 Settings
Set gateway to 172.25.250.254

tasks.name: Verify /boot partition exists
hints: Standard partitioning should create a /boot partition automatically
Check with: lsblk or df -h

tasks.name: Verify root filesystem is mounted
tasks.description: The root filesystem should be mounted at /
hints: The root partition should be created during installation
Check with: df -h /

tasks.name: Verify swap is enabled
tasks.description: Swap space should be configured and active
hints: Standard partitioning should create a swap partition automatically
Check with: swapon --show
